name: Modal Terminal Escape
description: Inspect three read-only reference buffers, repair six corrupt manifest fields, write and quit, then escape a seed-varying stack of terminal modes.
natural_language: Inspect all three read-only buffers, repair all six manifest fields in Vim, write and quit, then unwind every outer terminal layer.

metadata.notes: The browser terminal records ordinary keydown events and replays editor modes, four-buffer navigation, six individual line mutations, :wq, and a randomized pager/job/SSH/multiplexer exit stack. Paste and final-state claims are not accepted.
